already trust us
testimonials.t1_text: Very clear and well-illustrated guide. I created my account in 3 minutes flat!
testimonials.t2_text: I had lost access to my account for months. Thanks to this guide, I recovered everything. Thank you!
testimonials.t3_text: I thought it was complicated, but in 10 minutes I had my account and my virtual card. Too easy!
testimonials.t4_text: I didn't have a Visa card, the video on the virtual card allowed me to pay for my subscription and my Facebook ads.
testimonials.t5_text: I was finally able to store all my work files on Telegram, I no longer risk losing them.
testimonials.t6_text: I am impressed by the quality of the guide. It really helped me solve my security issues on Telegram.
testimonials.cta_text: Join the 1200 satisfied users and get your guide now.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I receive the guide?
faq.a1: After your payment, you receive a PDF by email containing the complete guide with all illustrated steps. Make sure to enter your email address correctly when ordering.
faq.q2: Does the guide work on iPhone?
faq.a2: Yes, absolutely! The guide is designed to work on all devices: iPhone, Android, PC and Mac. Each step is explained for each platform.
faq.q3: I can't recover my account, can the guide really help me?
faq.a3: Yes, the guide covers all Telegram account recovery methods: via SMS, email, and trusted contacts. Follow the steps and you'll get your account back.
faq.q4: Can I ask questions if I get stuck?
faq.a4: Yes! The guide includes access to our support. If you encounter any difficulty, you can contact us by email and we'll help you every step of the way.
